CustomField.description: Reference to the date captured on the Account which is populated by flow called Completed Onboarding Events - Update Corresponding Account Date Fields
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Date of the first completed Billing Training Call (Outreach Meeting Type = OBS/Eng Single-Site Brightwheel Billing Training (RR) or OBS/Eng Multi-Site Brightwheel Billing Training (RR))
CustomField.label: Billing Training Call Completed
